name: Open Brain Dashboard
description: SvelteKit dashboard for the Open Brain persistent AI memory system.

PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.description: Supabase anon/publishable key. Never use the service_role key here.

MCP_URL.description: Open Brain MCP edge function URL.

MCP_KEY.description: Server-only access key for the MCP edge function.

NODE_OPTIONS.description: Raises the HTTP header size limit so large Supabase session cookies do not trigger HTTP 400.
